title: Metro 2033 Redux

notes: Game wouldn't launch at first, only came up as an empty window and the only way to close it was a `pkill`. After setting "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%" as a launch option in steam, game launches and seems to work as expected.
title: Metro 2033 Redux

notes: Had a few freezes at first start, VSync doesn't work. Game is working fine.
title: Metro 2033 Redux

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Completed the game without any issues, performance is on par with the native port, though running it through proton grants faster load times, proper tesselation and parallax occlussion mapping, and antialiasing. Also the glitch of dithered shadows is not present while running via proton, while it is evident on the native port
